title: taraxacum subopacum
intro: Taraxacum subopacum, commonly known as the lesser creeping dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions due to its high concentration of flavonoids and terpenoids. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving liver function, and acting as an antioxidant, making it a potential remedy for conditions like liver disease, digestive issues, and skin problems. Taraxacum subopacum is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
